content.name: [VAS] Station Budget Watchdog
content.description: Keeps tagged player stations funded to a manual target, or handles all player stations with vanilla planned budgets: tops them up toward a fill level (default 2x) when below 1x, reclaims surplus above a trigger (default 3x) down to a leave level (default 1.5x). All levels, the transfer floor and the check interval are configurable. Pure MD, no vanilla files patched. Based on Happy Station by Bob Hood (MIT).
content.author: VasiliyTemniy
